title: cynoglossum meeboldii
intro: Cynoglossum meeboldii, also known as Chinese forked tongue or Tibetan forked tongue, is a plant species in the borage family native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiseptic effects. Its health benefits include relieving fever, treating respiratory issues, and reducing inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum meeboldii is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
